assertions.title: Creates OB zones on structure break events

steps.action: Run LuxAlgo MSS then LuxAlgo OB on 5m regression data
steps.expected: OB count <= MSS count, every OB upstream_refs[0] matches an MSS detection ID
steps.observed: MSS count=73, OB count=73. OB<=MSS: True. All 73 upstream_refs match MSS IDs.

steps.action: Run LuxAlgo MSS then LuxAlgo OB on 1m regression data
steps.expected: OB count <= MSS count, all upstream_refs valid
steps.observed: MSS count=388, OB count=388. OB<=MSS: True. All upstream_refs match MSS IDs.

evidence.terminalOutput: MSS detection count (5m): 73, OB detection count (5m): 73, OB count <= MSS count: True, All upstream_refs match MSS IDs: True. Sample: ob_5m_2024-01-07T17:55:00_bear -> mss_5m_2024-01-07T18:00:00_bear. 1m: MSS=388, OB=388, all refs valid.

assertions.title: Extreme candle anchor with ATR filter

steps.action: Run OB with default ATR filter (multiplier=2.0) on 5m data, inspect anchor selection
steps.expected: Anchor is the most extreme candle in structure interval, candle range < ATR * multiplier
steps.observed: 73 OBs created. For bearish OBs, anchor has highest high in interval (e.g., 1.094525==1.094525). For bullish OBs, anchor has lowest low. Candle range < ATR*2.0 confirmed for all anchors with valid ATR.

steps.action: Run OB with strict ATR filter (multiplier=0.1) to test rejection
steps.expected: Fewer OBs created when filter is stricter
steps.observed: Strict filter (0.1): 3 OBs. Normal filter (2.0): 73 OBs. Reduction of 70 OBs confirms ATR filter actively rejects candles.

evidence.terminalOutput: OB count with normal ATR filter (multiplier=2.0): 73. Sample: ob_5m_2024-01-07T18:40:00_bull anchor_bar_index=20, candle_range=0.000265, ATR=0.000175, <ATR*2.0: True. bearish OB: highest high in interval = anchor high. OB count with strict ATR filter (multiplier=0.1): 3. Reduction: 70 fewer OBs.

steps.action: Compare zone_high/zone_low to anchor candle high/low for all 73 OBs
steps.expected: zone_high == anchor high, zone_low == anchor low (wick-to-wick, not body-only)
steps.observed: All 73 OBs have zone_high == anchor candle high and zone_low == anchor candle low. 73/73 zones are wider than body-only range.

steps.action: Compare zone dimensions to a8ra body-only concept
steps.expected: LuxAlgo zones include wicks, a8ra uses body only
steps.observed: Example: ob_5m_2024-01-07T17:55:00_bear zone=[1.094445,1.094525] (range=0.000080) vs body=[1.094445,1.094485] (range=0.000040). Zone is wider because it includes wicks.

evidence.terminalOutput: All LuxAlgo OB zones use wick-to-wick: True. Zones wider than body: 73/73. Example: zone=[1.093495,1.093760] range=0.000265, body=[1.093560,1.093745] range=0.000185. a8ra OB uses zone_body (body-only), LuxAlgo uses zone_high/zone_low (wick-to-wick).

steps.action: Check state distribution across all 73 OBs on 5m data
steps.expected: States are ACTIVE, MITIGATED, or INVALIDATED. Both MITIGATED and INVALIDATED states present.
steps.observed: State distribution: INVALIDATED=64, MITIGATED=9. All states are valid (no ACTIVE on 5-day data with full forward scan).

steps.action: Verify mitigation is triggered by price touch
steps.expected: Bullish OB: low touches zone_high. Bearish OB: high touches zone_low.
steps.observed: Example MITIGATED: ob_5m_2024-01-10T01:55:00_bull, bar 684 low=1.092475 <= zone_high=1.092575.

steps.action: Verify invalidation is triggered by close through opposite side
steps.expected: Bullish OB: close < zone_low. Bearish OB: close > zone_high.
steps.observed: Example INVALIDATED: ob_5m_2024-01-07T17:55:00_bear, bar 27 close=1.094575 > zone_high=1.094525.

steps.action: Verify invalidated OBs cannot be subsequently mitigated
steps.observed: No mitigation-after-invalidation violations found across all 64 INVALIDATED OBs.

evidence.terminalOutput: State distribution: {INVALIDATED: 64, MITIGATED: 9}. MITIGATED example: ob_5m_2024-01-10T01:55:00_bull anchor=683 mitigation=684 low=1.092475<=zone_high=1.092575. INVALIDATED example: ob_5m_2024-01-07T17:55:00_bear anchor=11 mitigation=12 invalidation=27 close=1.094575>zone_high=1.094525. No mitigation-after-invalidation violations: True.

steps.action: Verify DetectionResult has correct type, primitive, variant fields
steps.observed: DetectionResult type confirmed. primitive=order_block, variant=luxalgo_v1, timeframe=5m.

steps.action: Validate all 73 Detection objects have required fields
steps.expected: Each detection has zone_high, zone_low, state, anchor_bar_index. IDs follow ob_{tf}_{timestamp}_{direction} format.
steps.observed: All 73 detections validated: correct ID format (ob_5m_*_bull/bear), direction in (bullish/bearish), type=order_block, all required properties present, zone_high>zone_low, valid states, upstream_refs point to mss_* IDs.

steps.action: Run full pytest suite for test_luxalgo_ob.py
steps.expected: All tests pass including schema validation tests

evidence.terminalOutput: DetectionResult: primitive=order_block, variant=luxalgo_v1, timeframe=5m. 73 detections all valid: IDs follow ob_{tf}_{timestamp}_{direction}, all have zone_high/zone_low/state/anchor_bar_index, zone_high>zone_low, states in (ACTIVE/MITIGATED/INVALIDATED), upstream_refs point to mss_* IDs. 29 pytest tests passed.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All LuxAlgo OB detector behaviors confirmed via Python CLI on the 5-day regression dataset. 29 unit tests also pass. OB zones correctly created from upstream MSS events (VAL-LOB-001), anchor selection uses extreme candle with ATR filter (VAL-LOB-002), zones use wick-to-wick range (VAL-LOB-003), lifecycle transitions work correctly with no post-invalidation mitigation (VAL-LOB-004), and all Detection objects conform to required schema with variant=luxalgo_v1 (VAL-LOB-005).
